_agent_notes: Nothing UNPARSED. No trainerbattle or giveitem in this map's scripts.inc. Kecleon object event is a hidden encounter (MOVEMENT_TYPE_INVISIBLE, FLAG_HIDE_FORTREE_CITY_KECLEON), not a person. FortreeCity_OnResume sets STEP_CB_FORTREE_BRIDGE (map script, not an object event). Sign bg_events (city sign, gym sign) exist but are bg_events, not object events.

dialogue.text: No one believes me, but I saw this gigantic POKéMON in the sky. It seemed to squirm as it flew toward ROUTE 131. By the way… Sniff… Um… You, uh…smell singed. Were you at a volcano or something?
The ground absorbs rainwater, and trees grow by drinking that water… Our FORTREE CITY exists because there's both water and soil.
I want to go to the POKéMON GYM, but something's blocking the way. After all the bother I went through training on ROUTE 120…
I've got my pride-and-joy POKéMON with me. This time, I'll beat WINONA.
Living on top of trees is okay. But sometimes BUG POKéMON come in through windows. It can be really startling.
The CITY consists of homes built on trees. Perhaps because of that lifestyle, everyone is healthy and lively. Why, even myself--I feel as if I've grown thirty years younger.
There are POKéMON that evolve when you trade them! That's what I heard.

0:4:7.object_type: object (Pokemon sprite, invisible passive encounter, not a person NPC)

dialogue.condition: checkitem ITEM_DEVON_SCOPE -> VAR_RESULT != TRUE (player lacks Devon Scope)
dialogue.text: Something unseeable is in the way.
Something unseeable is in the way. Want to use the DEVON SCOPE?

dialogue.condition: player answers YES at the above yes/no -> FortreeCity_EventScript_UseDevonScope; then setflag FLAG_KECLEON_FLED_FORTREE and removeobject
dialogue.text: {PLAYER} used the DEVON SCOPE. An invisible POKéMON became completely visible! The startled POKéMON fled!
